title: POST /books endpoint implemented
evidence: app.py:65-84 — @app.route('/books', methods=['POST']) validates title/author, inserts into database, returns 201 with created book

title: GET /books with ?author= filter implemented
evidence: app.py:86-96 — @app.route('/books', methods=['GET']) supports optional author query parameter with SQL filtering

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint implemented
evidence: app.py:98-104 — @app.route('/books/<int:book_id>', methods=['GET']) returns 404 if not found

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint implemented
evidence: app.py:106-129 — @app.route('/books/<int:book_id>', methods=['PUT']) supports partial updates, validates required fields, 404 on missing

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint implemented
evidence: app.py:131-139 — @app.route('/books/<int:book_id>', methods=['DELETE']) returns 204 status, 404 on missing

title: SQLite database storage implemented
evidence: app.py:16-29 — init_db() creates books table with proper schema (id, title, author, year, isbn)

title: Input validation implemented
evidence: app.py:70-73, 117-120 — checks title and author are non-empty strings, returns 400 on missing/invalid

title: JSON responses with HTTP status codes implemented
evidence: app.py:84,129,139 — status_code parameters (201, 200, 204, 400, 404), row_to_dict() converts to JSON

title: README.md with setup/run instructions provided
evidence: README.md:1-33 — Covers pip install, python app.py run, all endpoints, pytest command

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests defined and passing
evidence: test_app.py:18-80 — 7 tests: health, create_and_get_book, create_validation, list_and_filter, update_and_delete, update_missing

title: Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted
evidence: app.py:1-3, test_app.py:1-4 — ruff I001 suggests organizing imports (stdlib → third-party → local)
suggestion: Run ruff check --fix to auto-organize imports
